proof:
intro S T h
  apply ACCSystem.solsInclQuadSols_injective χ
  apply ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective χ.toACCSystemQuad
  exact h
failed_attempts:
intro S T h
  apply Sols.ext
  apply χ.quadSolsIncl_injective
  apply congrArg (fun L => (χ.linSolsIncl : χ.LinSols →ₗ[ℚ] χ.Charges) L) h

intro S T h
  apply Sols.ext
  have h' : (χ.solsInclQuadSols S).val = (χ.solsInclQuadSols T).val := by
    apply χ.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective
    exact congrArg (fun x => (x : χ.LinSols)) h
  exact congrArg (fun x => (x : χ.Charges)) h'

intro S T h
  apply Sols.ext
  apply χ.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective
  exact h

intro S T h
  apply Sols.ext
  apply χ.quadSolsIncl_injective
  exact h

intro S T h
  apply Sols.ext
  have h' : (χ.solsInclQuadSols S).val = (χ.solsInclQuadSols T).val := by
    apply (ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective χ.toACCSystemQuad)
    exact h
  exact congrArg (fun Q : χ.QuadSols => Q.val) h'

intro S T h
  apply Sols.ext
  apply ACCSystemQuad.QuadSols.ext
  exact χ.solsInclQuadSols_injective (by
    apply χ.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective
    exact h)

intro S T h
  apply Sols.ext
  apply χ.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective
  exact h

intro S T h
  apply solsInclQuadSols_injective χ
  apply quadSolsInclLinSols_injective χ
  exact h

intro S T h
  apply Sols.ext
  exact χ.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective (χ.solsInclQuadSols_injective h)

intro S T h
  apply Sols.ext
  apply χ.quadSolsIncl_injective
  exact h

intro S T h
  apply Sols.ext
  apply (ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective χ.toACCSystemQuad)
  apply (solsInclQuadSols_injective χ)
  exact h

intro S T h
  apply Sols.ext
  exact χ.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective (χ.solsInclQuadSols_injective h)

intro S T h
  apply Sols.ext
  have h' : (χ.solsInclQuadSols S).val = (χ.solsInclQuadSols T).val := by
    apply ACCSystemLinear.linSolsIncl_injective χ.toACCSystemLinear
    simpa [ACCSystem.solsInclLinSols, ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsInclLinSols,
      ACCSystem.solsInclQuadSols] using h
  exact ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective χ.toACCSystemQuad h'

intro S T h
  apply Sols.ext
  exact χ.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective (χ.solsInclQuadSols_injective h)

intro S T h
  apply Sols.ext
  apply χ.linSolsIncl_injective
  simpa [ACCSystem.solsInclLinSols] using congrArg (fun L => χ.linSolsIncl L) h

intro S T h
  apply Sols.ext
  have h' : (χ.solsInclQuadSols S).val = (χ.solsInclQuadSols T).val := by
    apply χ.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective
    simpa [ACCSystem.solsInclLinSols, MulActionHom.comp] using h
  simpa [ACCSystem.solsInclQuadSols] using h'

intro S T h
  apply Sols.ext
  exact χ.solsInclQuadSols_injective (χ.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective h)

intro S T h
  apply Sols.ext
  exact χ.linSolsIncl_injective (χ.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective (χ.solsInclQuadSols_injective h))
successful_attempts:
intro S T h
  apply ACCSystem.solsInclQuadSols_injective χ
  apply ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective χ.toACCSystemQuad
  exact h

intro S T h
  apply ACCSystem.solsInclQuadSols_injective χ
  apply ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective χ.toACCSystemQuad
  simpa [ACCSystem.solsInclLinSols, MulActionHom.comp] using h

intro S T h
  apply ACCSystem.solsInclQuadSols_injective χ
  apply ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective χ.toACCSystemQuad
  exact h

intro S T h
  apply χ.solsInclQuadSols_injective
  apply χ.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective
  exact h

intro S T h
  apply χ.solsInclQuadSols_injective
  apply χ.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective
  exact h

intro S T h
  apply Sols.ext
  exact congrArg (fun L : χ.LinSols => L.val) h

intro S T h
  apply Sols.ext
  exact congrArg (fun x => (x : χ.LinSols).val) h

intro S T h
  apply ACCSystem.solsInclQuadSols_injective χ
  apply ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective χ.toACCSystemQuad
  exact h

intro S T h
  apply χ.solsInclQuadSols_injective
  apply χ.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective
  exact h

intro S T h
  have h' : χ.solsInclQuadSols S = χ.solsInclQuadSols T := by
    apply χ.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective
    simpa [ACCSystem.solsInclLinSols, MulActionHom.comp] using h
  exact χ.solsInclQuadSols_injective h'

intro S T h
  apply χ.solsInclQuadSols_injective
  apply χ.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective
  exact h

intro S T h
  apply ACCSystem.solsInclQuadSols_injective χ
  apply ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective χ.toACCSystemQuad
  simpa [ACCSystem.solsInclLinSols, MulActionHom.comp] using h

intro S T h
  apply ACCSystem.solsInclQuadSols_injective χ
  apply ACCSystemQuad.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective χ.toACCSystemQuad
  exact h

intro S T h
  apply Sols.ext
  exact congrArg (fun (L : χ.LinSols) => L.val) h
